mapper.sql: r.RECIPE_ID AS recipeId, r.RECIPE_NM_KO AS recipeNmKo, r.SUMRY AS sumry, r.NATION_CODE AS nationCode, r.NATION_NM AS nationNm, r.TY_CODE AS tyCode, r.TY_NM AS tyNm, r.COOKING_TIME AS cookingTime, r.CALORIE AS calorie, r.QNT AS qnt, r.LEVEL_NM AS levelNm, r.VIDEO_URL AS videoUrl, r.HIT AS hit, r.LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, r.PRICE AS price, r.WRITER_ID AS writerId, r.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, m.NICKNAME AS writerNickname, m.PROFILE_IMG AS writerProfileImg, (SELECT img_url FROM recipe_image WHERE recipe_code = r.RECIPE_ID ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) AS thumbImgUrl
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT
FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.WRITER_ID = m.ID
JOIN recipe_tag rt ON r.recipe_id = rt.recipe_id
AND r.recipe_nm_ko LIKE CONCAT('%', #{recipeNmKo}, '%')
AND rt.tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO irdnt_info (RECIPE_ID, IRDNT_SN, IRDNT_NM, IRDNT_CPCTY, IRDNT_TY_CODE, IRDNT_TY_NM) VALUES
(#{item.recipeId}, #{item.irdntSn}, #{item.irdntNm}, #{item.irdntCpcty}, #{item.irdntTyCode}, #{item.irdntTyNm})
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT r.RECIPE_ID AS recipeId, r.RECIPE_NM_KO AS recipeNmKo, r.SUMRY AS sumry, r.NATION_CODE AS nationCode, r.NATION_NM AS nationNm, r.TY_CODE AS tyCode, r.TY_NM AS tyNm, r.COOKING_TIME AS cookingTime, r.CALORIE AS calorie, r.QNT AS qnt, r.LEVEL_NM AS levelNm, r.VIDEO_URL AS videoUrl, r.HIT AS hit, r.LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, r.PRICE AS price, r.WRITER_ID AS writerId, r.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, m.NICKNAME AS writerNickname, m.PROFILE_IMG AS writerProfileImg, (SELECT img_url FROM recipe_image WHERE recipe_code = r.RECIPE_ID ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) AS thumbImgUrl
FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.WRITER_ID = m.ID
JOIN recipe_tag rt ON r.recipe_id = rt.recipe_id
AND r.recipe_nm_ko LIKE CONCAT('%', #{recipeNmKo}, '%')
AND rt.tag_id IN
#{tid}
AND r.level_nm = #{levelNm}
AND CAST(REGEXP_SUBSTR(r.COOKING_TIME, '[0-9]+') AS UNSIGNED) <= 10
AND CAST(REGEXP_SUBSTR(r.COOKING_TIME, '[0-9]+') AS UNSIGNED) > 10 AND CAST(REGEXP_SUBSTR(r.COOKING_TIME, '[0-9]+') AS UNSIGNED) <= 30
AND CAST(REGEXP_SUBSTR(r.COOKING_TIME, '[0-9]+') AS UNSIGNED) > 30
AND r.recipe_id IN ( SELECT recipe_id FROM irdnt_info WHERE irdnt_nm IN
#{nm}
GROUP BY recipe_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT irdnt_nm) = ${irdntNms.size()} )
ORDER BY r.CREATED_AT DESC, r.RECIPE_ID DESC
ORDER BY r.LIKE_COUNT DESC
ORDER BY r.HIT DESC
ORDER BY ( r.LIKE_COUNT + ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review rv WHERE rv.RECIPE_CODE = r.RECIPE_ID AND rv.THUMBS_UP = 1 ) ) DESC
ORDER BY r.recipe_id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.recipe_id) FROM recipe r
JOIN recipe_tag rt ON r.recipe_id = rt.recipe_id
AND r.recipe_nm_ko LIKE CONCAT('%', #{recipeNmKo}, '%')
AND rt.tag_id IN
#{tid}
AND r.level_nm = #{levelNm}
AND CAST(REGEXP_SUBSTR(r.COOKING_TIME, '[0-9]+') AS UNSIGNED) <= 10
AND CAST(REGEXP_SUBSTR(r.COOKING_TIME, '[0-9]+') AS UNSIGNED) > 10 AND CAST(REGEXP_SUBSTR(r.COOKING_TIME, '[0-9]+') AS UNSIGNED) <= 30
AND CAST(REGEXP_SUBSTR(r.COOKING_TIME, '[0-9]+') AS UNSIGNED) > 30
AND r.recipe_id IN ( SELECT recipe_id FROM irdnt_info WHERE irdnt_nm IN
#{nm}
GROUP BY recipe_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT irdnt_nm) = ${irdntNms.size()} )

SELECT DISTINCT
FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.WRITER_ID = m.ID WHERE r.writer_id = #{writerId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe ( RECIPE_ID, RECIPE_NM_KO, SUMRY, NATION_CODE, NATION_NM, TY_CODE, TY_NM, COOKING_TIME, CALORIE, QNT, LEVEL_NM, VIDEO_URL, HIT, LIKE_COUNT, PRICE, WRITER_ID ) VALUES ( #{recipeCode}, #{recipeInfo.recipeNmKo}, #{recipeInfo.sumry}, #{recipeInfo.nationCode}, #{recipeInfo.nationNm}, #{recipeInfo.tyCode}, #{recipeInfo.tyNm}, #{recipeInfo.cookingTime}, #{recipeInfo.calorie}, #{recipeInfo.qnt}, #{recipeInfo.levelNm}, #{recipeInfo.videoUrl}, 0, 0, #{price}, #{writerId} )

INSERT INTO cooking_info (RECIPE_ID, COOKING_NO, COOKING_DC, STEP_TIP, STEP_IMG_URL, IMG_TYPE) VALUES
(#{item.recipeId}, #{item.cookingNo}, #{item.cookingDc}, #{item.stepTip}, #{item.stepImgUrl}, #{item.imgType})
mapper.update: UPDATE recipe SET RECIPE_NM_KO = #{recipeInfo.recipeNmKo}, SUMRY = #{recipeInfo.sumry}, NATION_CODE = #{recipeInfo.nationCode}, NATION_NM = #{recipeInfo.nationNm}, TY_CODE = #{recipeInfo.tyCode}, TY_NM = #{recipeInfo.tyNm}, COOKING_TIME = #{recipeInfo.cookingTime}, CALORIE = #{recipeInfo.calorie}, QNT = #{recipeInfo.qnt}, LEVEL_NM = #{recipeInfo.levelNm}, VIDEO_URL = #{recipeInfo.videoUrl}, PRICE = #{price} WHERE RECIPE_ID = #{recipeCode}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) from recipe where WRITER_ID=#{writerId}

SELECT
FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.WRITER_ID = m.ID WHERE r.RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId}

SELECT RECIPE_ID AS recipeId, COOKING_NO AS cookingNo, COOKING_DC AS cookingDc, STEP_TIP AS stepTip, STEP_IMG_URL AS stepImgUrl, IMG_TYPE AS imgType FROM cooking_info WHERE RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId} ORDER BY COOKING_NO ASC

SELECT RECIPE_ID AS recipeId, IRDNT_SN AS irdntSn, IRDNT_NM AS irdntNm, IRDNT_CPCTY AS irdntCpcty, IRDNT_TY_CODE AS irdntTyCode, IRDNT_TY_NM AS irdntTyNm FROM irdnt_info WHERE RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId} ORDER BY IRDNT_SN ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE recipe SET HIT = HIT + 1 WHERE RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId}
mapper.select: SELECT WRITER_ID FROM recipe WHERE RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId}
